description: During check-in, a front desk agent offers to sign up a guest for the hotel's loyalty program.

nodes.task_description: Explain the benefits of the loyalty program (e.g., points, free Wi-Fi, late check-out).

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the value proposition of the program.

nodes.task_description: Collect the guest's information to create a loyalty program account.
Create the new loyalty account and link it to the guest's current reservation to ensure they earn points for their stay.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the account and links it to the current stay.
